title: Geas Task Self-Check
description: Append-only self-check log for a task. One file per task holds the worker's self-check entries in the order they were produced. Each implementer pass (initial or verify-fix re-entry) appends a new entry; prior entries are preserved for iteration history.

entries.description: Append-only self-check entries in chronological order. Each entry corresponds to one implementer pass. Verify-fix re-entries point back to the prior entry via revision_ref.

entry_id.description: Monotonically increasing id starting at 1 within this file.

completed_work.description: What the worker believes was actually completed in this pass.

reviewer_focus.description: Areas reviewers should inspect first, based on the worker's implementation experience in this pass. Empty array if none.

known_risks.description: Forward-looking risks, weak spots, or unresolved concerns that remain after this pass. Empty array if none.

deviations_from_plan.description: Differences between implementation-contract planned_actions and what actually happened in this pass. Empty array if the plan was followed.

gap_signals.description: Early signals of scope or expectation gaps noticed during implementation. Feeds into closure evidence and mission-level gap. Empty array if none.

revision_ref.description: entry_id of the prior self-check entry this revises. Set on verify-fix re-entries to link back to the previous pass. Null on the first (or any non-revision) entry.
